/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Registeration.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registeration.dir/CGetpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Registeration.dir/Registeration.cpp.o -o Registeration  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/anaconda3/lib /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/lib/libOsqpEigen.0.8.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/anaconda3/lib/libosqp.dylib
